articles.headline: World Cup final squads ranked: Of all 48 national teams, who can win this summer?

keyEvents.text: Goal!  Jamaica 1, Dominican Republic 0. Shamar Nicholson (Jamaica) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Renaldo Cephas   following a fast break.
Ronaldo Vásquez (Dominican Republic) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Damion Lowe (Jamaica) is shown the yellow card.
First Half ends, Jamaica 1, Dominican Republic 0.
Second Half begins Jamaica 1, Dominican Republic 0.
Substitution, Dominican Republic. Edison Azcona replaces Carlos Ventura.
Substitution, Jamaica. Karoy Anderson replaces Damion Lowe.
Daniel Johnson (Jamaica) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Heinz Mörschel (Dominican Republic) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Dominican Republic. Rafael Leonardo Núñez Mata replaces Ronaldo Vásquez.
Michael Hector (Jamaica) is shown the yellow card.
Jahmali Waite (Jamaica) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Jamaica. Richard King replaces Michael Hector.
Substitution, Jamaica. Deshane Beckford replaces Daniel Johnson.
Luiyi de Lucas (Dominican Republic) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Penalty missed! Still  Jamaica 1, Dominican Republic 0. Bobby De Cordova-Reid (Jamaica) hits the left post with a right footed shot.
Substitution, Jamaica. Kaheim Dixon replaces Shamar Nicholson.
Substitution, Dominican Republic. Brayan Ademán replaces César García because of an injury.
Substitution, Dominican Republic. Charbel Wehbe replaces Edarlyn Reyes.
Substitution, Dominican Republic. José Luis De la Cruz replaces Heinz Mörschel because of an injury.
Jean López (Dominican Republic) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Jamaica. Kevon Lambert replaces Renaldo Cephas.
Second Half ends, Jamaica 1, Dominican Republic 0.
